name: OmopProcedureProcedureOccurrence
title: OMOP-Convertible Procedure → procedure_occurrence
description: FHIR Procedure that can be converted to OMOP `procedure_occurrence`. Status must be completed or in-progress; requires a subject, a performed[x] date, and a code that resolves to the OMOP Procedure domain.

binding.description: SNOMED Procedure or a source code (CPT4 / ICD10PCS / ICD9Proc / HCPCS / OPS) that maps to OMOP Procedure via concept_relationship 'Maps to'. This binding is the routing key — if Procedure.code is not in this ValueSet, the resource is not a procedure_occurrence and should be tried against another profile (e.g. domain may resolve to Drug, Device, Measurement, Observation, or Condition).

element.comment: Required for procedure_occurrence.procedure_date. Accepts dateTime, Period, string, Age, Range.
